TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: David Andrews kawas tay 195, David Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan na sraral 1952 kawas 11 byacing 2 ryax, Andrews htgan beh Baton Rouge Louisiana.mqwas beh Louisiana krahu' pqwasan biru.1970 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru. pincyogan nya David Andrews ga mhtuw te qutux ega,1984 kawas ngungu ega Nightmare on Elm Street"榆樹街上的噩夢". 1987 kawas, BBC na Pulaski. 1990 kawas mhtuw Stephen King's Graveyard Shift . hiya pincyogan nya Mann & Machine"曼恩與機器" blaq . 1995 kawas,David Andrews mhtuw Pete Conrad. 1998 kawas,mhtuw Earth to the Moon"從地球到月球" . 2001 kawas, mhtuw Band of Brothers. Andrews mhtuw Fight Club. 2000 kawas,mhtuw Navigating the Heart.suruw lga,mhtuw Silence of the Lambs. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *a*i* an*rews~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ***, *a*i* an*rews~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan na s~ɕraral **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax, an*rews~ɕ ħtɣan βeħ βaton rouɣe louis~ɕiana.mqwas~ɕ βeħ louis~ɕiana kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja *a*i* an*rews~ɕ ɣa mħtuw te qutux eɣa,**** kawas~ɕ ŋuŋu eɣa niɣħtmare on elm s~ɕtreet"*******". **** kawas~ɕ, ββʦ~ʨ na pulas~ɕki. **** kawas~ɕ mħtuw s~ɕtepħen kiŋʔs~ɕ ɣra*ejar* s~ɕħi*t . ħija pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mann & maʦ~ʨħine"*****" βlaq . **** kawas~ɕ,*a*i* an*rews~ɕ mħtuw pete ʦ~ʨonra*. **** kawas~ɕ,mħtuw eartħ to tħe moon"******" . **** kawas~ɕ, mħtuw βan* o* βrotħers~ɕ. an*rews~ɕ mħtuw *iɣħt ʦ~ʨluβ. **** kawas~ɕ,mħtuw na*iɣatiŋ tħe ħeart.s~ɕuruw lɣa,mħtuw s~ɕilenʦ~ʨe o* tħe lamβs~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: David Andrews kawas tay 195, David Andrews, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan na sraral 1952 kawas 11 byacing 2 ryax, Andrews htgan beh Baton Rouge Louisiana.mqwas beh Louisiana krahu' pqwasan biru.1970 kawas tmasoq pqwasan biru. pincyogan nya David Andrews ga mhtuw te qutux ega,1984 kawas ngungu ega Nightmare on Elm Street"榆樹街上的噩夢". 1987 kawas, BBC na Pulaski. 1990 kawas mhtuw Stephen King's Graveyard Shift . hiya pincyogan nya Mann & Machine"曼恩與機器" blaq . 1995 kawas,David Andrews mhtuw Pete Conrad. 1998 kawas,mhtuw Earth to the Moon"從地球到月球" . 2001 kawas, mhtuw Band of Brothers. Andrews mhtuw Fight Club. 2000 kawas,mhtuw Navigating the Heart.suruw lga,mhtuw Silence of the Lambs. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *a*i* an*rews~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ***, *a*i* an*rews~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan na s~ɕraral **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax, an*rews~ɕ ħtɣan βeħ βaton rouɣe louis~ɕiana.mqwas~ɕ βeħ louis~ɕiana kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq pqwas~ɕan βiru. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja *a*i* an*rews~ɕ ɣa mħtuw te qutux eɣa,**** kawas~ɕ ŋuŋu eɣa niɣħtmare on elm s~ɕtreet"*******". **** kawas~ɕ, ββʦ~ʨ na pulas~ɕki. **** kawas~ɕ mħtuw s~ɕtepħen kiŋʔs~ɕ ɣra*ejar* s~ɕħi*t . ħija pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja mann & maʦ~ʨħine"*****" βlaq . **** kawas~ɕ,*a*i* an*rews~ɕ mħtuw pete ʦ~ʨonra*. **** kawas~ɕ,mħtuw eartħ to tħe moon"******" . **** kawas~ɕ, mħtuw βan* o* βrotħers~ɕ. an*rews~ɕ mħtuw *iɣħt ʦ~ʨluβ. **** kawas~ɕ,mħtuw na*iɣatiŋ tħe ħeart.s~ɕuruw lɣa,mħtuw s~ɕilenʦ~ʨe o* tħe lamβs~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
